notes: Genuine Kiwibank OFX (Money/Quicken) export used as a parser test case. SAVINGS account 99-1234-0123456-07 is synthetic/redacted (99 is not a real Kiwibank branch; Kiwibank bank code is 38). Contains INTEREST EARNED and one debit; NZD; ledger balance 150.42. Includes Kiwibank-specific <BANKID>Download quirk. No customer name or PII.

Authentic 15-column Kiwibank internet-banking CSV export layout (Account number,Effective Date,Transaction Date,Description,Transaction Code,Particulars,Code,Reference,Other Party Name,Other Party Account Number,Other Party Particulars,Other Party Code,Other Party Reference,Amount,Balance). Account 38-8106-0601663-00 uses correct Kiwibank bank code 38; rows are synthetic (Sushi, PAK N SAVE, Alice/Bob). Content extracted verbatim from a public repo test fixture; identical header independently corroborated by sschengyf/my-accountant. No PII.

Official Kiwibank guide 'HOW TO View, download and print bank statements' on Kiwibank's own media host. NOT DOWNLOADED - egress policy blocks all non-GitHub hosts (403). Likely embeds annotated sample-statement screenshots (transaction-table imagery). New find not previously captured; retry download in an unrestricted environment. Verify no real PII before use.

Canonical/normalised 8-column Zera Books 'Xero standard' import schema (transaction_date,description,amount,debit_credit,balance,currency,unique_id,memo) - a reconciled accounting-software import layout, NOT the bank's native online-banking export format. Fully synthetic: 8 rows incl. an opening-balance row (Payroll deposit, Office supplies/Staples inv 88321, Client wire, SaaS subscription, Merchant batch, Rent, Bank service fee); NZD; running balance; debit/credit indicator. Rows are identical across the NZ banks, differing only in the opening balance and the KIWIBANK- unique_id prefix. CC BY 4.0, attribution Zera Books.
